name: 概率基础
subject: math
domain_name: 统计与概率 / Statistics & Probability / Statistics & Probability
curriculum_points: The derivative interpreted as gradient function and as rate of change.
Informal understanding of the gradient of a curve as a limit.
Derivative of f(x)=ax^n is f′(x)=anx^{n−1}, n∈ℤ. The derivative of functions of the form f(x)=ax^n +bx^{n−1}+... where all exponents are integers.
Tangents and normals at a given point, and their equations.
